# Copilot Instructions

- Generate TypeScript with explicit public types.
- Prefer `Result`-style returns for recoverable errors.
- Use semantic HTML in UI examples.
- Keep tests close to the code they verify.
- Use repository package scripts instead of ad hoc commands.
- Avoid creating new root-level config files.
- Do not suggest cloud services for local-only workflows.
- Include edge cases in generated examples.
- Respect existing lint and formatting style.
- Keep generated comments useful and rare.
